title: Single Number
description:
Given a non-empty array `nums` where every element appears **twice** except for
one, find that single element.
constraints: Each element appears twice except for one which appears once.

solutions.summary: Add a value on first sight, remove it on the second; the loner is left.

steps.title: Toggle membership in a set
steps.explanation: For each value, remove it if present, otherwise add it. Pairs cancel out.

steps.title: Return the lone survivor
steps.explanation: Exactly one value never got cancelled — return it.
